company_domain_or_name_find_email_from_n: Company domain or name (find email from name)
contacts_found_at_the_domain_name_email_: Contacts found at the domain (name, email, domain)
e_g_software_engineer_ceo_product_manage: e.g. Software Engineer, CEO, Product Manager
education_history_school_degree_fieldofs: Education history (school, degree, fieldOfStudy, startDate, endDate)
employees_found_name_linkedinurl_company: Employees found (name, linkedinUrl, companyWebsite, companyName, jobTitle)
find_a_prospect_verified_work_email_from: Find a prospect verified work email from their name and company, or from a LinkedIn URL.
find_and_verify_b2b_emails_phones_employ: Find and verify B2B emails, phones, employees, and company data
given_a_company_domain_find_employees_by: Given a company domain, find employees by job title and enrich the company profile into a team map.
integrate_findymail_to_find_verified_wor: Integrate Findymail to find verified work emails by name, domain, or LinkedIn URL, verify deliverability, reverse-lookup profiles from emails, enrich company data, find employees by job title, look up phone numbers, search technology stacks, and check credit usage.
linkedin_url_at_least_one_of_url_domain: LinkedIn URL (at least one of URL/domain/name required)
phone_number_in_e_164_format_us_only: Phone number in E.164 format (US only)
return_full_profile_data_on_reverse_look: Return full profile data on reverse lookup
reverse_lookup_an_email_address_with_fin: Reverse-lookup an email address with Findymail to recover the full LinkedIn profile and current company.
run_a_list_of_email_addresses_through_fi: Run a list of email addresses through Findymail verification and split into deliverable and undeliverable.
stripe_at_least_one_of_url_domain_name: Stripe (at least one of URL/domain/name required)
stripe_com_at_least_one_of_url_domain: stripe.com (at least one of URL/domain/name required)
whether_the_profile_has_linkedin_premium: Whether the profile has LinkedIn Premium
